scripts.prestart: npm --prefix ../.. run build:scripts --silent && node ../../scripts/dist/ensure-shared-build.mjs && npm run build
scripts.predev: npm --prefix ../.. run build:scripts --silent && node ../../scripts/dist/ensure-shared-build.mjs && npm run build
scripts.pretest: npm --prefix ../.. run build:scripts --silent && node ../../scripts/dist/ensure-shared-build.mjs && npm run build && npm run build:test
